result.stdout:
Usage:
  init [targetDir]
  run <artifactsRoot> [runId] [endTick] [snapEvery] [seed] [--guard-state] [--compress] [--fingerprint-every N] [--snapshot-every N] [--max-pump-steps N] [--max-events-per-tick N] [--rng-version v1|v2] [--cancel-after-ms N]
  validate-run <artifactsRoot> [runId] [endTick] [snapEvery] [seed] [--guard-state] [--compress] [--fingerprint-every N] [--snapshot-every N] [--max-pump-steps N] [--max-events-per-tick N] [--rng-version v1|v2] [--cancel-after-ms N]
  fast-replay <artifactsRoot> [runIdOrRunDirOrEmptyForLatestWithEvents] [endTick] [ignored] [seed]
  verify-run <artifactsRoot> [runIdOrEmptyForLatestWithEvents] [endTick] [ignored] [seed]
  event-stats <artifactsRoot> [runId?] [topN?] [fromTick?] [toTick?] [--only K|--kind K]...
  timeline <artifactsRoot> [runId?] [fromTick?] [toTick?] [maxPerTick?] [maxPayloadChars?] [--only K|--kind K]...
  pretty-inspect <artifactsRoot> [runIdOrRunDirOrEmptyForLatest]
  list-runs <artifactsRoot> [limit]
  inspect-run <artifactsRoot> <runIdOrRunDir>
  bisect <artifactsRoot> [runIdOrRunDirOrEmptyForLatestWithEvents] [endTick] [ignored] [seed]
  repro <artifactsRoot> [runIdOrEmptyForLatestWithEvents] [failureTickOrEmptyForLatest] [seedOverride]
